remarks: Spacious 2/3 bedroom apartment with a flexible bonus room that can be used as a third bedroom, home office, or den. Features off-street parking, freshly painted interiors, refinished floors, washer hookup in the basement, and gas heat. Conveniently located near downtown, shopping, restaurants, and public transportation.Pets will be considered on a case-by-case basis with a one-time payment of $300 non-refundable pet fee. Certain breeds may be restricted. Credit check and references required. Two months' security deposit and first month's rent due at lease signing. Rent is $2,700/month. Advertised price reflects 1/2 month free rent with 1 year lease, amortized over 12 months. Leases signed by August 15, 2026 or sooner. Offer valid through August 1, 2026.
